narrative:
Lawrence 5 (precinct in Stark County) has 962 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.2 percentage points.
